input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.5.2
            TITLE: the vehicle must be capable of being tilted to a 45° angle without leaking fluid of any type.

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.5.2: The vehicle must be capable of being tilted to a 45° angle without leaking fluid of any type.
T.5.5.2 The vehicle must be capable of being tilted to a 45° angle without leaking fluid of any type.

final_answer: The vehicle must be capable of being tilted to a 45° angle without leaking fluid of any type.
